title: taraxacum pruiniferum
intro: Taraxacum pruiniferum, also known as the meadow dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum pruiniferum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms associated with digestive issues, as well as exhibiting potential antidiabetic and antihypertensive properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
